name: Bunker Kappa-3 | Helka Stravovna Eisen
description:
🪖“Lead with a hard heart and steady hands.”⚙️

In the world of Ash and Smoke, where the ruins of the old world burn under gray skies, tribes forge their destiny among mutated beasts and sacred rituals.

Beneath the steel bones of Búnker-Kappa, where drills never sleep and loyalty is forged in fire, Helka Eisen commands. Scarred general, iron-hearted grandmother, her voice shakes recruits and soothes nightmares. Discipline is prayer. Family, the only law.

.

.

.

Búnker Theta-1
creator: _Loveless_
